name: Spectral
svg_fragment: <g class="hw-rule"><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="{{rule_width}}" y2="0" stroke="url(#{{uid}}-spectral-grad)" stroke-width="2" stroke-opacity="0.7"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="{{rule_width}}" y2="0" stroke="url(#{{uid}}-spectral-grad)" stroke-width="8" stroke-opacity="0.12" filter="url(#{{uid}}-spectral-glow)"/></g>
defs: <linearGradient id="{{uid}}-spectral-grad" x1="0%" x2="100%" y1="0%" y2="0%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00FFAB" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#00FFAB"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="#00D4FF"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#7B2FFF"/><stop offset="65%" stop-color="#FF2FAB"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#FF6B2F"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FF6B2F" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><filter id="{{uid}}-spectral-glow" x="-10%" y="-200%" width="120%" height="500%"><feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="4"/></filter>
